baseline.normalizationNote: Vietnamese thousands separator normalized to integer milliseconds.
baseline.note: Time figures are copied from the user-provided evidence text. Phase242A did not replay production data.

controlledTrace.reason: No production-equivalent, accounting-safe fixture was available in the workspace for a write-path replay of closeout.
controlledTrace.impact: The audit can identify static query groups and accounting-safe boundaries, but cannot attribute all 157 observed queries to exact stage/model counters.

callGraph.work: Normalize selected order ids/codes, require reason, derive actor, call AccountingCloseoutService.confirmDeliveryAccounting, shape response.
Deduplicate duplicate submits by date, selected order ids, and actor.
Read selected SalesOrder rows outside transaction for selection validation and idempotent fast skip.
Read ReturnOrder rows for pending orders and validate inventory lifecycle guard.
Re-read SalesOrder and ReturnOrder rows inside Mongo session before posting writers.
Build closeout from SSoT, compare existing deliveryCloseout, write salesOrders closeout patch, post allocation, reconcile debt, log audits.
Upsert orderPaymentAllocation, check/post AR rows, check/post fund rows, update posted refs.
Inspect AR balance, check debt adjustment idempotency, safety re-read, optional adjustment post, after-read.
Queue AR debt read-model sync after transaction commits.

queryGroups.growth: O(1) for stable SO ids, may split into direct id query plus fallback identity query
O(1), optional fallback second find when no rows match direct identity query
O(1) batched identity read inside transaction

queryGroups.operation: find by idempotency then findOneAndUpdate per AR row
findByIdempotencyKey plus possible code lookup/upsert per cash/bank row
raw/canonical balance reads, debt adjustment idempotency reads, optional post, after-read

queryGroups.accountingSafety: post-commit queue, outside core writer transaction

nPlusOneFindings.finding: AR row idempotency check/post is executed serially for each generated AR ledger row per order.
nPlusOneFindings.risk: Cannot batch blindly because conflict detection and post ordering are part of accounting safety.

nPlusOneFindings.finding: Debt reconcile reads AR balance before apply, safety re-reads before post, checks idempotency, and after-reads.
nPlusOneFindings.risk: These are intentional fresh reads. Optimization requires a dedicated accounting proof.

nPlusOneFindings.finding: Cash and bank fund ledger paths each perform idempotency checks and possible sequence/code lookup.
nPlusOneFindings.risk: Potential query growth, but fund ledger idempotency is writer-adjacent.

duplicateReadFindings.finding: Orders/returns are read once for preflight validation and again inside transaction.
duplicateReadFindings.allowedOptimization: Only a future phase may reduce payload/projection or add safe trace counters; do not remove transaction re-read.

safeOptimizationCandidatesForPhase242B.title: Add disabled-by-default query trace around static stages
requirements: no query execution in disabled mode

safeOptimizationCandidatesForPhase242B.title: Measure AR idempotency reads per generated ledger row with controlled fixture
Investigate read-only projection narrowing for preflight order load
requirements: prove all fields used by scope validation and response diagnostics remain present

doNotOptimizeWithoutDedicatedAccountingP: Do not remove CloseoutCriticalReader transaction re-read.
Do not parallelize writer path with Promise.all.
Do not batch AR/Fund writes without idempotency and ordering proof.
Do not skip debt reconcile safety re-read.
Do not change Mongo schema or indexes in Phase242A.
Do not change SSoT: inventories, arLedgers, fundLedgers, returnOrders.
